title: App: Head Swap — 2-image head/face swap with head selector
description:
NEW APP (child of MPI-259 Apps v2). Head Swap: swap a selected head in a base image with the head from a reference character image.

FULL DESIGN RECORD: docs/playbooks/add-app/existing-apps/head-swap.md (shape, injection surface, dependency, hair-detector dead end). Portable box-gizmo contract: docs/playbooks/add-app/ui/box-gizmo.md. READ BOTH before wiring — do not re-derive.

WORKFLOW AUTHORED (2026-07-18, ComfyUI tab app_head_swap). Injection surface: Input_Image, Input_Box, Input_Image_2, Input_Box_2, Input_Tier (1=Quality/2=Turbo/3=Hyper), Input_Seed, Output_Image. NO Input_Positive/Input_Negative — prompts BAKED (fixed-prompt outcome app). Model = qwen-edit (already shipped+tested, MPI-300; tierSelect/qwenTier->Input_Tier — this app mirrors it, no new tier work). Also needs comfyui-inpaint-cropandstitch node pack.

BOX SYSTEM (user authored new MpiNodes): Mpi Box (widgets x,y,width,height -> mpi_box type) + consumers Mpi Box Mask (full-frame white rect) / Mpi Box Crop (cut region) / Mpi From Box (unpack to ints). x/y = TOP-LEFT absolute source px (verified). Out-of-bounds CLAMPS to intersection, no padding -> GIZMO MUST CONSTRAIN BOX TO IMAGE BOUNDS or user silently gets non-square crop. Base image -> Mask; reference image -> Crop.

BLOCKED ON MPI-304 (requiredDeps): app needs a 1.2GB head-swap LoRA that must NOT become a qwen-edit dep (would tax every Qwen user). Cannot wire until apps can require deps directly.

ALSO BLOCKED ON USER: (1) fp32-vs-fp16 LoRA A/B — decides what gets uploaded (fp16 ~half size, tested previously; workflow now app-shaped so browser testing is awkward), (2) R2 upload of the winner (DO NOT upload until precision decided), (3) save graph + drop in comfy_workflows/raw/ + sync.

NEXT SESSION ORDER: MPI-304 first (unblocks), then sync workflow, then UI (box gizmo + slot previews).

PROCEDURE: /mpi-add-app enforces docs/playbooks/add-app/. Dev-gated. 4th app — dev-gate LIFTS at >=4 apps (MPI-259 item F); decide whether the 3 plumbing apps stay before public.

--- STATUS 2026-07-18 (umbrella) ---
WIRING SHIPPED (commit 5c2a4622): op appHeadSwap in all 4 files, app_head_swap.json converted from the authored raw graph (33 nodes, 0 dangling, validate-injection-rules passes), headSwapInjector (MpiBox has FOUR widgets and the generic title injector writes ONE value into one widget name, so a plain Input_Box param would have matched the node and silently written nothing), qwen-lora-headswap in loraDeps.js, AppDef with requiredDeps. Unblocked by MPI-304 (requiredDeps), shipped f9636b35.

REMAINING ON THIS CARD (updated 2026-07-19):
- uiComponent -> SHIPPED via MPI-306 (app carousel frame, Phases 1-3). Head Swap declares two
  box steps + a tier radio and is the frame's first real instance. User-verified by real local
  generations.
- CORRECTION: the old "app CANNOT RUN - the graph 404s on the LoRA" claim was WRONG. It always
  ran locally (the weight is on disk at G:\CubricModels\loras\qwen\). The missing R2 upload
  only ever blocked RunPod/remote and installs on OTHER machines. Check the disk before calling
  an app unrunnable.
- fp32-vs-fp16 A/B: SETTLED 2026-07-18. rank-16 fp16 (307MB) LOST in two generations; reverted
  to rank-32 fp32 (1.2GB, 5552b819). Note what was NOT tested: that file is a quarter the size
  and only HALF the saving is precision - the rest is RANK. A rank-32 fp16 (~600MB) would be the
  real precision-only test but HuggingFace publishes none. So: "rank-16 fp16 lost", NOT "fp16 lost".
- R2 UPLOAD: DONE 2026-07-19. bfs_head_v5_2511_merged_version_rank_32_fp32.safetensors is live at
  https://models.cubric.studio/vision/models/loras/qwen/ (1,206,402,600 bytes, HTTP 200, size
  matches local exactly). rclone writes to R2 REQUIRE --s3-no-check-bucket (scoped token 403s on
  CreateBucket otherwise - reads like no-write-access when write is fine).
- sha256 in loraDeps.js: pending the round-trip verify (download the served bytes and hash them -
  the field verifies the DOWNLOAD, not the local file). Local hash 0a137e61...07cd10.
- STILL OPEN: end-to-end RunPod verification. The LoRA no longer blocks it, but MPI-309 DOES:
  the graph needs MpiBox/MpiBoxCrop/MpiBoxMask and those nodes are NOT in the pinned MpiNodes
  commit (they exist only in the local working tree), so the Pod rejects app_head_swap.json with
  unknown node types before any weight is loaded. Do MPI-309 (push the nodes + bump
  dev_configs/node_lock.json) FIRST.

events.note: RunPod verification blocked by MPI-309 (box MpiNodes not in the pinned commit).
